content.text:
Deep research is running in the background — it'll fan out 5 parallel search angles, fetch and verify sources, then synthesize a report. You'll be notified when it completes (typically 2–4 minutes).

`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
The workflow runs 5 independent search agents simultaneously (masonry CSS, bento grids, card density UX, mod browser patterns, information hierarchy), then adversarially verifies every factual claim with a 3-vote panel before it makes it into the final report. This eliminates the "confident but wrong" results you get from a single search.
`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`

While it runs — the three browser variations in `Upgraded/` use a uniform 3-column CSS grid right now. The research will tell us whether native CSS masonry, a JS-assisted approach, or a bento-style layout would work best for cards with variable description lengths. The answer will directly feed into the next `generate.py` revision.
